mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, stu.nickname AS userName,c.title,s.exam_name,s.usual_score,s.exam_score,s.total_score,s.grade_level,tea.nickname AS teacherName,s.remark FROM score s JOIN user stu ON s.student_id = stu.id JOIN user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.id JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.remark IS NOT NULL
AND stu.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')

SELECT s.id,stu.nickname userName,c.title,s.exam_name,s.usual_score,s.exam_score,s.total_score,s.grade_level,tea.nickname teacherName,s.remark FROM score s JOIN user stu ON s.student_id = stu.id JOIN user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.id JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id where s.teacher_id = #{userId} order by s.total_score desc

SELECT s.id, stu.nickname AS userName,c.title,s.exam_name,s.usual_score,s.exam_score,s.total_score,s.grade_level,tea.nickname AS teacherName,s.remark FROM score s JOIN user stu ON s.student_id = stu.id JOIN user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.id JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id where c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') order by s.total_score desc

SELECT s.id, stu.nickname AS userName,c.title,s.exam_name,s.usual_score,s.exam_score,s.total_score,s.grade_level,tea.nickname AS teacherName,s.remark FROM score s JOIN user stu ON s.student_id = stu.id JOIN user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.id JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id
AND stu.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
